default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel's AI-powered content generation service and potentially onboard Webstacks as a client.](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's service uses AI workflows to generate high-quality content at scale for SEO and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [It combines AI writing with human editing, strategy, and publishing for a full-service content solution](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Marcel aims for 100k+ words per month at $0.10/word including dedicated staff](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Initial results show the content performing well in search rankings and driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Marcel proposes kicking off with Webstacks on August 12th for a 3-month trial period](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Content Workflow

  - [Uses latest AI models and prompts to generate outlines, drafts, research](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Human editors trained on SEO, brand voice, etc. adapt and refine the content](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Includes strategy like keyword research, competitor analysis, content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [End-to-end service from drafting to publishing, with air table workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

### Pricing and Scope

  - [$9k/month retainer, aiming for 100k+ words at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Includes Marcel's strategic oversight and a dedicated editor](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Additional costs for Air Ops instance (\~$1.5k/month) can be deferred initially](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Potential discounts for referrals Webstacks provides](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2349.0)

### Integration with Webstacks

  - [Weekly checkins and deep dives to align on process, priorities, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2664.0)
  - [Flexibility for Webstacks team's involvement (reviews, approvals, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Opportunity to create new content types beyond just blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Potential integration with Strapi as a customer case study](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send over a SOW for Webstacks to review](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=3278.0)
  - [Jesse to discuss costs with Nikan and get budget approved](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=2497.0)
  - [Target kickoff on August 12th if budget is secured](https://fathom.video/share/P5J7K9x1bmrWLeRnyrafD62-HqsEbxu_?tab=summary&timestamp=3461.0)

action_items.description: Hold off on signing up for Air Ops until content program is established
Give content program at least 3 months before evaluating performance
Involve Devin in content program onboarding and discovery process
Lock in August 12th for program kickoff call
Consider Web Stacks as a case study for Athlete, if both parties are open to it
Finalize details and come to an agreement before officially starting the content program
